name: Agentic Context Management: Solving Agent Memory and Cost by Treating Them as Lifecycle and Architecture Problems
summary: arXiv:2607.21503v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production AI agents' failures are less often due to an inability to reason well and more often because they cannot manage what is in their reasoning...
description: arXiv:2607.21503v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production AI agents' failures are less often due to an inability to reason well and more often because they cannot manage what is in their reasoning context: conversation histories, large prompts, large tool definitions, and ballooning tool outputs. Agents drown in their own accumulating history while paying a token cost that grows every turn, pr...
author: Gaurav Dadhich
